settings.title: First sip
settings.body: A kitchen-table idea became a portable carbonation bottle.

settings.title: Flavor packs
settings.body: In-house flavors made natural taste part of the ritual.

settings.title: Everyday fizz
settings.body: Bottles, Charge, and flavors for desk, trail, and home.

settings.question: How do I get started?
settings.answer: Pick a bottle finish, add Fizz Charge, and try a flavor pack.

settings.question: Is Fizz reusable?
settings.answer: Yes — the bottle is built for everyday reuse with swappable Fizz Charge canisters.

settings.heading: Our Story
settings.intro: Our journey began with a simple idea: sparkling water should be portable, delicious, and easy.
settings.story_body: Fizz brings together a reusable bottle, Fizz Charge CO₂, and natural flavor packs so you can carbonate anywhere — desk, trail, kitchen, or travel.
